ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the visiting team */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Number of periods played */,
  "postseason" INTEGER /* Whether the game was part of the postseason */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the game was played in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Final, In Progress) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game was played in */,
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arena where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, championship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_arena_id FOREIGN KEY ("arena_id") REFERENCES arenas ("arena_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Short name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Short name of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the team */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "ot" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistics belong to */,
  "playoff_stats" INTEGER /* Whether the statistics are from the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the arena is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the arena */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the arena */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id")
)
